home.title: AutoPrintFlow turns uploaded artwork into moderated, print-ready sticker sheets.
home.description: Users upload their own image, place it inside a square sticker frame, preview the result, and submit it for moderation. Admins review the queue, group approved stickers into stripes and A4 sheets, and download production PNGs on demand.
home.featureUploadDescription: PNG, JPG, and WEBP uploads stay private to the owner.
home.featureEditDescription: Square editor with move, zoom, stretch, rotate, fit, and fill controls.
home.featureModerateDescription: Submitted stickers require admin approval before they enter the print queue.
home.featureExportDescription: Approved items are grouped into stripes of 8 and A4 sheets of 3 stripes.
home.uploadEditDescription: Users start with a private upload, then move and scale artwork inside the square editor before the final PNG is generated.
home.uploadEditBody: Each sticker keeps the original upload, editor transform state, generated preview, and print-ready 496x496 px export. No uploaded sticker is exposed publicly.
home.moderationDescription: Only approved stickers count toward printable queue stats and printable exports.
home.moderationBody: Submitted items remain pending until an admin approves or rejects them. Approved stickers are ordered by approval time, then packed into stripes and A4 sheets deterministically.
home.protectedDescription: The app serves sticker, stripe, and A4 assets through checked routes instead of exposing storage directly.
home.protectedBody: Users can download only their own stickers. Admins can download individual stickers, stripes, and full A4 sheet layouts with the same server-side authorization model.

auth.loginDescription: Access your drafts, queue status, and protected sticker downloads.
auth.registerDescription: Create a private workspace for uploads, moderation, and print-ready exports.

dashboard.emptyDraftsDescription: Create a new layout to upload artwork and start building a print-ready sticker.
dashboard.emptySubmittedDescription: Once you submit a sticker, it will appear here with its moderation result and protected PNG download.
dashboard.emptyArchiveDescription: Create your first layout to see sticker history, statuses, and protected downloads here.

editorNew.statsDraftsHelper: Editable and private to your account
editorNew.emptyRecentDescription: Upload your first image above to create a draft and open the square sticker editor.

upload.title: Upload a source image
upload.description: PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WEBP are supported. Square images work best, but the editor can crop and stretch any ratio into the final sticker frame.
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drop an image here or click to browse
upload.dropzoneDescription: The app stores the original upload privately, generates the 42x42 mm export, and keeps all sticker files protected behind session checks.
upload.recommended: Recommended: upload the highest-resolution original you have for cleaner scaling and safer moderation previews.

editor.title: Position the artwork inside the 42x42 mm frame
editor.description: Drag the image, scale it freely, stretch it horizontally or vertically, and rotate it if needed. The final export is a 496x496 px PNG.
editor.deterministic: The editor output is deterministic: the same transform state will always render the same PNG, stripe slot, and A4 sheet placement on the server.
editor.finalPreviewDescription: Live square output before the 496x496 px PNG is written to storage.
editor.stripePreviewDescription: Approved stickers are grouped into stripes of 8. Your sticker occupies one protected slot once moderation passes.
editor.stripePreviewNote: The live mockup mirrors the production stripe generator: 2 columns, 4 rows, soft white sticker cards, and a black footer band.

admin.printableQueueTitle: A4 sheets grouped from approved stickers
admin.printableQueueEmptyDescription: Approved stickers will appear here automatically, grouped by approval time into stripes and landscape A4 sheets.
admin.pendingModerationDescription: Approve or reject submitted stickers before they enter the printable queue.
admin.approvedQueueDescription: Approved stickers are already packed into queue sheets. Use mark printed when production is complete.
admin.rejectedDescription: Rejected items remain visible for audit and can be reworked by the user.
admin.printedDescription: Archive of stickers already marked as printed.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The requested resource could not be found or is no longer available in the current queue state.

api.authInvalidFields: Enter a valid email and password.
api.authAccountExists: An account with this email already exists.
api.authRegisterInvalid: Please fill in all registration fields correctly.
api.onlyApprovedCanBePrinted: Only approved stickers can be marked as printed.
api.onlySubmittedCanBeApproved: Only submitted stickers can be approved.
api.onlySubmittedCanBeRejected: Only submitted stickers can be rejected.
api.onlyPngJpgWebp: Only PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WEBP files are supported.
api.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Upload an image up to 12 MB.
api.imageCouldNotBeProcessed: The uploaded image could not be processed.
api.stickerNoLongerEditable: This sticker can no longer be edited.
